note: Maps flagged lab results to follow-up tests and relevant vaccines. For educational guidance only — not a diagnosis.

high.message: Elevated HbA1c suggests your blood sugar has been running high over the past 3 months — pre-diabetes or diabetes territory.

follow_up_tests.name: Fasting Glucose
follow_up_tests.reason: Confirm elevated blood sugar with a second test

follow_up_tests.name: Oral Glucose Tolerance Test (OGTT)
follow_up_tests.reason: Definitively diagnoses pre-diabetes or Type 2 diabetes

follow_up_tests.name: Fasting Insulin
follow_up_tests.reason: Checks if your pancreas is working harder than it should

follow_up_tests.name: Microalbumin/Creatinine Ratio (urine)
follow_up_tests.reason: Early kidney stress screen, important if blood sugar is high

vaccines.reason: Diabetes raises risk of serious flu complications — annual flu shot is strongly recommended
Pneumococcal disease is more severe in people with diabetes
Higher hepatitis B risk in people with diabetes due to blood glucose monitoring equipment

high.message: Fasting glucose above 100 mg/dL may indicate pre-diabetes. Confirm with repeat testing.

follow_up_tests.name: HbA1c
follow_up_tests.reason: Shows average blood sugar over 3 months — more reliable than a single glucose reading

follow_up_tests.name: Fasting Insulin + HOMA-IR
follow_up_tests.reason: Measures insulin resistance

follow_up_tests.name: Lipid Panel
follow_up_tests.reason: Pre-diabetes often comes with abnormal cholesterol

vaccines.reason: Blood sugar dysregulation increases flu severity
Recommended for those with or at risk of diabetes

low.message: Blood sugar below 70 mg/dL at fasting — could be reactive hypoglycemia or prolonged fast.

follow_up_tests.name: Fasting Insulin
follow_up_tests.reason: Rule out insulinoma or other causes of low glucose

follow_up_tests.name: Cortisol (morning)
follow_up_tests.reason: Low cortisol can cause hypoglycemia

high.message: Total cholesterol above 200 mg/dL increases long-term cardiovascular risk.

follow_up_tests.name: Full Lipid Panel (LDL, HDL, TG)
follow_up_tests.reason: Break down which fraction is driving the total

follow_up_tests.name: hs-CRP (high-sensitivity C-reactive protein)
follow_up_tests.reason: Measures vascular inflammation — independent heart risk marker

follow_up_tests.name: Homocysteine
follow_up_tests.reason: Elevated homocysteine independently raises heart and stroke risk

follow_up_tests.name: Apolipoprotein B (ApoB)
follow_up_tests.reason: More precise cardiovascular risk predictor than LDL alone

vaccines.reason: Influenza significantly increases heart attack risk in the weeks following infection
Recommended for adults with cardiovascular risk factors

high.message: High LDL ('bad' cholesterol) is the primary driver of arterial plaque buildup.

follow_up_tests.name: ApoB / ApoA1 ratio
follow_up_tests.reason: More accurate cardiovascular risk than LDL in isolation

follow_up_tests.name: Lipoprotein(a) [Lp(a)]
follow_up_tests.reason: Genetically elevated Lp(a) is a strong independent heart risk — checked once in a lifetime

follow_up_tests.name: hs-CRP
follow_up_tests.reason: Inflammation amplifies LDL-related risk

follow_up_tests.name: Thyroid (TSH)
follow_up_tests.reason: Hypothyroidism is a common reversible cause of high LDL

vaccines.reason: Flu markedly raises short-term heart attack risk
Cardiovascular disease raises pneumonia severity

low.message: Low HDL ('good' cholesterol) reduces arterial protection and raises heart disease risk.

follow_up_tests.name: Triglycerides
follow_up_tests.reason: Low HDL and high triglycerides often occur together (metabolic syndrome)

follow_up_tests.name: Fasting Glucose / HbA1c
follow_up_tests.reason: Low HDL is linked to insulin resistance

follow_up_tests.name: ApoA1
follow_up_tests.reason: Protein that carries HDL — gives a more complete picture of protective cholesterol

vaccines.reason: Metabolic syndrome and low HDL increase influenza complication risk

high.message: Elevated triglycerides are linked to diet, excess weight, alcohol and insulin resistance.

follow_up_tests.name: Fasting Glucose / HbA1c
follow_up_tests.reason: High triglycerides often signal underlying blood sugar issues

follow_up_tests.name: Liver Function (ALT, AST, GGT)
follow_up_tests.reason: Fatty liver is a common companion of high triglycerides

follow_up_tests.name: TSH
follow_up_tests.reason: Hypothyroidism can raise triglycerides

vaccines.reason: Metabolic dysfunction raises flu complication risk

high.message: Elevated creatinine may indicate reduced kidney function — this should be followed up promptly.

follow_up_tests.name: eGFR (estimated Glomerular Filtration Rate)
follow_up_tests.reason: Directly estimates how well kidneys are filtering — the key CKD metric

follow_up_tests.name: BUN (Blood Urea Nitrogen)
follow_up_tests.reason: Another kidney waste marker to confirm impairment

follow_up_tests.name: Urine Microalbumin/Creatinine Ratio
follow_up_tests.reason: Detects early kidney leakage — can catch damage before creatinine rises

follow_up_tests.name: Urine Complete Analysis
follow_up_tests.reason: Looks for casts and protein that signal kidney damage

follow_up_tests.name: Blood Pressure monitoring
follow_up_tests.reason: Hypertension is both a cause and consequence of CKD

vaccines.reason: Kidney disease significantly raises risk of flu complications
Strongly recommended for all stages of CKD
Hepatitis B vaccination is recommended before dialysis becomes necessary

low.message: Low eGFR means kidneys are not filtering at full capacity — classify and monitor kidney disease stage.

follow_up_tests.name: Urine Albumin-to-Creatinine Ratio
follow_up_tests.reason: Confirms and stages chronic kidney disease (CKD)

follow_up_tests.name: Renal Ultrasound
follow_up_tests.reason: Visualizes kidney size and structure

follow_up_tests.name: Electrolytes (Na, K, Bicarbonate)
follow_up_tests.reason: Kidneys regulate electrolyte balance — check for imbalances

vaccines.reason: Essential for all CKD patients
CKD is a high-risk condition for pneumococcal disease
Recommended before kidney disease progresses to dialysis stage

high.message: Elevated uric acid raises gout risk and may stress the kidneys over time.

follow_up_tests.name: Creatinine + eGFR
follow_up_tests.reason: Uric acid is cleared by kidneys — check kidney function

follow_up_tests.name: 24-hour Urine Uric Acid
follow_up_tests.reason: Determines if over-production or under-excretion is the cause

follow_up_tests.name: Lipid Panel + Fasting Glucose
follow_up_tests.reason: Hyperuricemia is associated with metabolic syndrome

vaccines.reason: Fever from flu can trigger gout attacks

high.message: Elevated ALT suggests liver cell stress or inflammation — most commonly fatty liver, but viral hepatitis must be ruled out.

follow_up_tests.name: AST / ALT ratio
follow_up_tests.reason: Ratio helps distinguish fatty liver from alcoholic liver disease

follow_up_tests.name: GGT (Gamma-glutamyl transferase)
follow_up_tests.reason: Sensitive marker of liver stress, especially from alcohol or medications

follow_up_tests.name: Hepatitis B Surface Antigen (HBsAg)
follow_up_tests.reason: Rule out active hepatitis B infection

follow_up_tests.name: Hepatitis C Antibody (Anti-HCV)
follow_up_tests.reason: Rule out hepatitis C — often asymptomatic

follow_up_tests.name: Liver Ultrasound
follow_up_tests.reason: Check for fatty liver, fibrosis or structural changes

follow_up_tests.name: Albumin
follow_up_tests.reason: Measures liver's protein-making function

vaccines.reason: Hepatitis A can cause acute liver failure on top of existing liver disease
All adults with liver disease should be immune to hepatitis B

high.message: Elevated AST can come from the liver, heart muscle, or skeletal muscle.

follow_up_tests.name: ALT
follow_up_tests.reason: If ALT is also high, likely liver-specific; if AST >> ALT, consider heart or muscle

follow_up_tests.name: CK (Creatine Kinase)
follow_up_tests.reason: If muscle or heart damage is suspected

follow_up_tests.name: Hepatitis B and C serology
follow_up_tests.reason: Rule out viral hepatitis

follow_up_tests.name: GGT
follow_up_tests.reason: Confirms liver origin of elevated AST

vaccines.reason: Protect the liver from additional insult
Hepatitis B check and vaccination for unimmunized adults with liver enzyme elevations

low.message: Low hemoglobin means anemia — your blood is carrying less oxygen than it should.

follow_up_tests.name: Serum Ferritin
follow_up_tests.reason: Measures iron stores — the most common anemia cause is iron deficiency

follow_up_tests.name: Serum Iron + TIBC (Total Iron Binding Capacity)
follow_up_tests.reason: Confirms iron deficiency anemia pattern

follow_up_tests.name: Vitamin B12
follow_up_tests.reason: B12 deficiency causes megaloblastic anemia — common in vegetarians

follow_up_tests.name: Folate (Folic Acid)
follow_up_tests.reason: Deficiency also causes large-cell anemia

follow_up_tests.name: Reticulocyte count
follow_up_tests.reason: Shows if bone marrow is responding to anemia

follow_up_tests.name: Peripheral blood smear
follow_up_tests.reason: Classifies anemia type by red cell shape

vaccines.reason: Anemia from any cause impairs immune response — flu vaccination is especially important
Anemia raises pneumonia severity risk

low.message: Low hematocrit confirms reduced red cell volume — iron studies and B12/folate should follow.

follow_up_tests.name: Serum Ferritin
follow_up_tests.reason: Most common cause of low hematocrit is iron deficiency

follow_up_tests.name: Vitamin B12 + Folate
follow_up_tests.reason: Deficiency causes anemia with large red cells

follow_up_tests.name: Reticulocyte count
follow_up_tests.reason: Assesses bone marrow response

vaccines.reason: Anemia weakens immune response — vaccination more important

low.message: Vitamin D deficiency is very common in Indonesia and linked to immune function, bone health and mood.

follow_up_tests.name: Parathyroid Hormone (PTH)
follow_up_tests.reason: Chronically low vitamin D elevates PTH — check bone metabolism

follow_up_tests.name: Calcium + Phosphorus
follow_up_tests.reason: Vitamin D regulates calcium absorption

follow_up_tests.name: Bone Density (DEXA scan)
follow_up_tests.reason: If deficiency has been prolonged or you are post-menopausal

vaccines.reason: Vitamin D plays a key role in respiratory immune defense — vaccination compensates
Low vitamin D is linked to more severe respiratory infections

high.message: High TSH means the thyroid is underactive (hypothyroidism) — the pituitary is calling for more thyroid hormone.

follow_up_tests.name: Free T4 (fT4)
follow_up_tests.reason: Confirms hypothyroidism — low fT4 with high TSH = primary hypothyroidism

follow_up_tests.name: Free T3 (fT3)
follow_up_tests.reason: Active thyroid hormone — low in overt hypothyroidism

follow_up_tests.name: Anti-TPO antibodies
follow_up_tests.reason: Positive in Hashimoto's thyroiditis (autoimmune thyroid disease)

follow_up_tests.name: Lipid Panel
follow_up_tests.reason: Hypothyroidism commonly raises cholesterol

vaccines.reason: Thyroid conditions increase vulnerability to respiratory infections

low.message: Low TSH suggests an overactive thyroid (hyperthyroidism) or thyroid hormone excess.

follow_up_tests.name: Free T4 + Free T3
follow_up_tests.reason: Confirms hyperthyroidism and severity

follow_up_tests.name: TSH receptor antibodies (TRAb)
follow_up_tests.reason: Diagnoses Graves' disease — the most common cause

follow_up_tests.name: Thyroid Ultrasound
follow_up_tests.reason: Checks for nodules or diffuse enlargement

vaccines.reason: Thyroid disease can complicate flu illness

high.message: Elevated white blood cell count may indicate infection, inflammation or — rarely — blood disorders.

follow_up_tests.name: Differential WBC count
follow_up_tests.reason: Which cell type is elevated narrows the cause (bacterial vs viral vs allergy vs leukemia)

follow_up_tests.name: CRP + ESR
follow_up_tests.reason: Inflammation markers to gauge infection severity

follow_up_tests.name: Blood culture
follow_up_tests.reason: If bacterial infection is suspected

follow_up_tests.name: Peripheral blood smear
follow_up_tests.reason: If leukemia or lymphoma is being considered

vaccines.reason: Recurrent infections raise suspicion of immune dysregulation — vaccination important
Important if immune system is under stress

low.message: Low white cell count (leukopenia) can signal viral infection, bone marrow suppression or autoimmune disease.

follow_up_tests.name: Differential WBC count
follow_up_tests.reason: Identifies which cell line is low

follow_up_tests.name: ANA (Antinuclear antibody)
follow_up_tests.reason: Screen for autoimmune disease (lupus, etc.)

follow_up_tests.name: Vitamin B12 + Folate
follow_up_tests.reason: Deficiencies suppress bone marrow

follow_up_tests.name: HIV test
follow_up_tests.reason: HIV causes progressive leukopenia if untreated

vaccines.reason: Low immunity makes flu more dangerous — consult doctor on vaccine timing
Immune suppression raises pneumococcal disease risk significantly

low.message: Low platelets (thrombocytopenia) can increase bleeding risk — the cause must be identified.

follow_up_tests.name: Peripheral blood smear
follow_up_tests.reason: Confirms and classifies platelet reduction

follow_up_tests.name: Dengue NS1 + IgM/IgG
follow_up_tests.reason: Dengue fever is a common cause of sudden platelet drop in Indonesia

follow_up_tests.name: ANA + Anti-dsDNA
follow_up_tests.reason: Autoimmune thrombocytopenia (ITP) screen

follow_up_tests.name: Coagulation panel (PT, aPTT)
follow_up_tests.reason: Assess clotting ability with low platelets

vaccines.reason: Dengvaxia is available in Indonesia for dengue prevention — discuss with your doctor
